capperBio: Dr. Capper brings experience in comprehensive eye care for over 3 decades. She specializes in the diagnosis and management of glaucoma, diabetic eye disease, age-related macular degeneration, and cataracts. Her commitment to patient care and clinical excellence has made her a trusted name in the area.
drMattBio: Dr. Matt is dedicated to providing exceptional eye care with a focus on patient education and personalized treatment plans. With extensive experience in comprehensive optometry, he is committed to helping patients achieve optimal vision and eye health.
